mainEntity.name: Step-by-step: How to file workers comp claim in Sandy UT if employer ignores my report?
mainEntity.text: Step-by-step: How to file workers comp claim in Sandy UT if employer ignores my report?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. Report injury to employer immediately (180-day max). 2. If ignored, file Form 122 directly with Utah Labor Commission Industrial Accidents Division. 3. Get physician's report. 4. Request hearing if denied[1][4].

suggestedAnswer.text: In Sandy, if employer skips their 7-day reporting duty, submit your own First Report of Injury (Form 122) to the Labor Commission within deadlines. Physician must file within 7 days. Track via online portal; delays forfeit benefits. Attorney can expedite against non-compliant employers[1][3][4].
